title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.404 - Specific requirement requests of policyholder may be met by alteration
text:
376.404.  Specific requirement requests of policyholder may be met by alteration. — Upon written request by the group policyholder, the coverages required in section 376.397 may be changed or altered to meet the specific requirements of such group policyholder.
(L. 1981 S.B. 58 § 5) 
Effective 1-01-83
